## Summary

Brief description of the feature or improvement.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? (e.g. performance, ergonomics, enabling a use case.)

## Proposed API or behaviour

If applicable: example API, grammar extension, or behaviour change.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative designs or workarounds you thought about.

## Additional context

Optional: links, related issues, prior discussion.
